description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher MUST obtain OAuth token via secrets fabric at ORDER 1. No hardcoded tokens. Token refresh on 401 automatic via fabric. TTL enforced.
blockConditions: Hardcoded API token in config or code
OAuth token not obtained via ISecretsFabric
401 response not handled with transparent refresh
passConditions: Token TTL enforced by secrets provider

description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher MUST recursively traverse component hierarchy with cycle detection at ORDER 1. Max depth 50. Cyclic hierarchy returns error. Components normalized to flat list with parentId references.
blockConditions: Component hierarchy traversed without cycle check
passConditions: Recursive traversal with cycle detection at ORDER 1

description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher MUST emit DesignFetched CloudEvent with frameId, components, hierarchy metadata. Emit ComponentHierarchyNormalized event with parentId mappings.
blockConditions: Event missing frameId or component count
passConditions: DesignFetched emitted with frameId, component count

description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher MUST validate frame ownership via fabric at ORDER 1. Cross-frame access forbidden. tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage only.
blockConditions: T666 accesses frame from other tenant
passConditions: Frame ownership validated via fabric at ORDER 1

description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher MUST store design data in xiigen-webflow-designs index with knowledgeScope=PRIVATE before emitting events. Record includes frameId, components, hierarchy, cssSelectors, metadata.
blockConditions: Design data not stored before event emission
Component hierarchy or CSS data missing

description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher requires: (1) OAuth token via secrets fabric, (2) Component hierarchy normalization with cycle detection, (3) CSS selector parsing, (4) Frame-scoped queries, (5) CloudEvents emission. Transfer OAuth pattern from FLOW-40 (client-push).
blockConditions: Secrets fabric not used for OAuth
passConditions: T666 uses secrets fabric for token refresh

description: T666 WebflowDesignFetcher generation prompt MUST specify: (1) OAuth token via secrets fabric, (2) Recursive hierarchy traversal with cycle detection (max depth 50), (3) CSS selector parsing to classes, (4) Frame-scoped element isolation, (5) CloudEvents emission, (6) Outbox pattern. Reference FLOW-40 OAuth pattern.
T666 WebflowDesignFetcher: xiigen-webflow-designs index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-frame access forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only.
passConditions: Design records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from ALS
All xiigen-webflow-designs reads include tenantId predicate
